final_prompt.prompt:
Create an interior design illustration of a tea room (any in-image text in Chinese, if rendered).

Style/medium: needs a "新中式" aesthetic — references in the spirit of 宋画 ink-and-color tradition, 明代文人书房 spatial composition, 隈研吾 contemporary natural material integration; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: framing is yours
Subject: must include a solid wood tea table (原木茶台), purple clay teapot and tea cups (紫砂壶和茶杯), bonsai (盆景)
Scene/backdrop: must include calligraphy scrolls (书法卷轴) as background, bamboo shadows swaying outside the window (窗外竹影婆娑)
Lighting/mood: needs a serene, contemplative atmosphere for tea meditation (禅意盎然, 品茗静思) — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: if any in-image text is rendered, default to Chinese
Avoid:
